frames.name: Market Impact Frame
frames.description: Focuses on immediate financial market reactions, stock declines, and energy price surges as primary story angle
frames.emphasis: Stock market losses, oil/gas price increases, and broader economic implications

frames.name: Energy Security Frame
frames.description: Centers on threats to global energy supply chains and infrastructure disruption
frames.emphasis: Strait of Hormuz closure, attacks on energy facilities, and supply chain disruptions

frames.name: Inflation Concern Frame
frames.description: Highlights potential for renewed inflation crisis and impact on monetary policy
frames.emphasis: Rising consumer prices, central bank policy implications, and comparison to 2022 Ukraine crisis

frames.name: Consumer Impact Frame
frames.description: Focuses on direct effects on American consumers, particularly gasoline prices
frames.emphasis: Rising gas prices, consumer advice, and practical economic impacts

outlierPerspectives: China's diplomatic pressure on Iran to keep Strait of Hormuz open (DW only)
Insurance industry response with war risk coverage cancellations (DW only)
Travel disruptions and stranded passengers in Dubai (NBC News only)
Iraq shutting down oil production due to shipping bottlenecks (ABC News only)
missingContext: Historical context of previous Strait of Hormuz closures and their duration
Strategic petroleum reserve levels and potential government response
Alternative shipping routes and their capacity limitations
Specific timeline and escalation triggers for the US-Israeli operations
Iran's actual military capabilities to sustain the strait closure
Regional allies' positions and potential mediation efforts
Long-term energy transition implications amid crisis
